name: european-union namespace ships pre-authored rule YAMLs for GDPR + EU AI Act + DORA + EDPB Guidance frameworks
command: test -f "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/european-union/gdpr.yaml" && test -f "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/european-union/eu-ai-act.yaml" && test -f "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/european-union/dora.yaml" && test -f "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/european-union/edpb-guidance.yaml" && echo eu-namespace-populated 1>&2
